UNIDRAW

Think, draw, and generate in one shared space. An infinite collaborative whiteboard powered by native AI art generation.

Architecture

From wireframe to render.

Concept Art

Sketch to environment.

Abstract Forms

Collaborative exploration.

UI Wireframes

Layout on the grid.

Character

Multiplayer ideation.

3D Assets

Geometry on canvas.

The Colab Engine

Not just an AI prompt box. A fully featured workspace where human intent meets machine intelligence.

1. Live Multiplayer

See cursors, sketches, and AI generations appear instantly for everyone.

2. AI Lasso Generation

Draw a freeform region, type a prompt, and UniDraw AI fills it with stunning, canvas-aware art — instantly.

3. Sticky Notes & Shapes

Miro-level elements: sticky notes, connectors, frames, text blocks — all draggable and resizable.

UNIDRAW

An infinite collaborative canvas where human creativity meets AI. Think, draw, and generate — together.

#ColabDraw #UniDraw AI
